text: Good customer service but they rarely have Oraimo power banks.
I came for an Apple charger but it wasn't available.
Prices are higher than nearby shops.
Customer: Good afternoon. Do you have Oraimo Power Bank? Owner: No. Customer: Thank you.
Customer: How much is an iPhone 13 screen replacement? Owner: ₦85,000. Customer: Okay.
Customer: Do you deliver? Owner: Not yet. Customer: Alright.
